commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Gateway/WebChat image-model override plan, threads one-turn model/fallback/auth overrides through reply execution, and adds focused gateway and auto-reply regression coverage plus a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. Current-main source shows WebChat image routing is based on the active session model, while the docs define `agents.defaults.imageModel` as the image path when the primary cannot accept images; I did not execute a failing live run in this read-only review.
